details: Zhuanhua@1.1.99 is a dependency-confusion stub (version-squatted to 1.1.99, copied README from another package) that ships a malicious browser iframe-injection script in px.js alongside a legitimate Simplified↔Traditional Chinese converter. The px.js script creates a fullscreen loading overlay and redirects the viewer via an iframe to hxxps://tckyv[.]ygh8tas[.]icu, a non-allowlisted external domain. The script is inactive at install time (no lifecycle hooks) but is bundled as part of the package and would execute if imported in a browser context.

cwes.name: Inclusion of Functionality from Untrusted Control Sphere
